title: FP Memory Graph v1
description: Typed graph linking schema cards, lesson cards, and evidence ledgers. Nodes and edges support blast-radius traversal, cluster detection, hub scoring, and incremental update. Structural validation only; cross-field, path, hash, and edge-reference rules are enforced by memory-graph.js.

graph_id.description: Stable identifier for this graph snapshot, e.g. 'fp-memory-graph'

updated_at.description: When this graph snapshot was last rebuilt from source cards

nodes.description: All nodes (schema cards, lesson cards, evidence ledgers, templates) in the FP memory graph

edges.description: All typed directed edges between nodes

extensions.description: Open extension point for custom data; validated only that it is an object

node_id.description: Stable identifier derived from the filename without .md extension, e.g. 'L001-remote-stateful-service-chain'

node_type.description: What kind of FP artifact this node represents

file_path.description: Path relative to the fp/ repository root, e.g. 'fp/lessons-learned/L001-remote-stateful-service-chain.md'

content_hash.description: sha256:<hex> of the source file content at build time. Used for incremental update detection.

status.description: Promotion/state status of the node, using FP's standard lifecycle vocabulary

schema_name.description: Human-readable name from the card's ## Schema Name heading. Only meaningful for schema_card nodes.

task_types.description: Keywords describing the class of work this schema applies to. Used for cluster retrieval.

in_degree.description: Number of edges pointing to this node. Computed at build time.

out_degree.description: Number of edges originating from this node. Computed at build time.

is_hub.description: True when in_degree >= 3. Hub cards (in_degree >= 5) are flagged separately by detectHubsAndBridges().

is_bridge.description: True when removing this node would disconnect the graph into multiple components.

is_moc.description: True when this node is a Map of Content (index card). MOCs have no task-types and list sub-cards via informs edges.

betweenness.description: Normalized betweenness centrality score (Brandes' algorithm). 0 = never on shortest paths; 1 = on all shortest paths.

community_id.description: Community/cluster ID assigned by findCommunities(). Nodes in the same community share the same ID.

last_validated.description: When this node's evidence was last independently verified

edge_type.description: Typed relationship between source and target

direction.description: Always 'outgoing' from the source's perspective. 'incoming' edges are the reverse view and are derived, not authored.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the evidence that justifies this edge, e.g. a task ID or command reference

created_at.description: When this edge was first recorded

seed_node_id.description: The node from which the blast-radius traversal started

affected_nodes.description: Union of forward_fanout and reverse_fanout, deduplicated

forward_fanout.description: Nodes reachable by following outgoing edges from the seed

reverse_fanout.description: Nodes that have an edge pointing TO the seed (inbound dependents)

depth.description: BFS depth limit used for the traversal

community_id.description: Unique identifier for this community, e.g. 'community-0'

node_ids.description: Node IDs belonging to this community

label.description: Human-readable label derived from the most-connected node in the community

algorithm.description: Algorithm used. 'connected_components' for undirected connectivity; 'label_propagation' for a lightweight community-detection pass.

modularity.description: Modularity score when using label_propagation. Not computed for connected_components.

hubs.description: Nodes sorted by in_degree descending. Only nodes with in_degree >= 3 are included.

connects_communities.description: Community IDs that would become disconnected if this node were removed

bridges.description: Nodes whose removal would increase the number of connected components

changed_nodes.description: Nodes whose content_hash changed since the last build

hash_diffs.description: Detailed hash comparison for each changed node

affected_nodes.description: Nodes in the blast-radius of changed nodes that may also need review

needs_review.description: Subset of affected_nodes whose status or edge relationships may be invalidated by the changes
